description: Longview subscription IDs are opaque strings (for example longview-10). Pins the required/non-empty/traversal rejections both languages share and the get GET. Go additionally rejects a '#' in the id; Python does not (see report).

cases.name: rejects empty subscription_id
cases.expect_error: subscription_id must be a non-empty string

cases.name: rejects a path separator in subscription_id
cases.expect_error: subscription_id must not contain path separators, query separators, or traversal segments
